# Awesome Emerging — LLM-Ready Catalog

> A curated list of emerging open source projects that actually matter.
> Signal-filtered, momentum-tracked, community-curated.

**Last updated**: 2026-03-23
**Website**: https://tidoemanuele.github.io/awesome-emerging/
**GitHub**: https://github.com/tidoemanuele/awesome-emerging

---

## Signal Legend

| Rating | Meaning | Threshold |
|--------|---------|----------|
| 🔥 Hot | Massive community attention | >500 HN points or >10k GitHub stars |
| ⚡ Rising | Clear upward trajectory | >100 HN points or >1k GitHub stars |
| 🌱 Early | Promising but nascent | Growing interest |

---

## AI Agents & Frameworks

Frameworks, tools, and infrastructure for building, deploying, and orchestrating AI agents.

**98 projects**

### 🌱 [1Code](https://github.com/21st-dev/1code)

AI-powered code generation tool by 21st.dev.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-16
- **Signal**: 🌱 39 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🔥 [agency-agents](https://github.com/msitarzewski/agency-agents)

Pre-built agent marketplace — shell-based agent configurations for instant deployment. Surged to 54,556 stars (+25,297/week), the single highest weekly star gain in 2026 tracking. Still trending on Mar 19.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-10
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 54,556 stars (+25,297/week)
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🔥 [Agent Lightning](https://github.com/microsoft/agent-lightning)

Microsoft's high-velocity agent framework — 12,951 GitHub stars.

- **Discovered**: 2026-02-02
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 12,951 stars
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### ⚡ [AgentMail](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=46812608)

Email API for AI agents — YC S25 launch with 106 HN points.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-30
- **Signal**: ⚡ 106 HN points
- **Tags**: `agent`

### 🌱 [AgentServe](https://github.com/PropsAI/agentserve)

Deploy AI agents as REST APIs with auto-scaling infrastructure.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-27
- **Signal**: 🌱 9 HN points
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🌱 [Akshen]()

Community-driven repository of verified, tested AI prompts.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-26
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked

### 🌱 [APA AI Protocol](https://www.apaaiprotocol.org)

Standard protocol for agent-to-agent communication and interoperability.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-27
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked

### 🔥 [BettaFish](https://github.com/666ghj/BettaFish)

Chinese-origin multi-agent sentiment analysis framework — 37,654 stars. Part of the 666ghj swarm intelligence ecosystem.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-10
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 37,654 stars
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🌱 [AutoGen](https://github.com/microsoft/autogen)

Microsoft's multi-agent conversation framework for complex AI workflows.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-29
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [ChartGPU](https://github.com/ChartGPU/ChartGPU)

GPU-accelerated charting library for real-time high-performance data visualization.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-22
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [claude-code-orchestrator](https://github.com/mohsen1/claude-code-orchestrator)

Tmux + credit rotation wrapper for running multiple Claude Code sessions.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-25
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [claude-flow](https://github.com/ruvnet/ruflo)

External orchestration layer for Claude Code — model-agnostic multi-agent coordination.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-25
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🔥 [claude-mem](https://github.com/thedotmack/claude-mem)

Persistent memory layer for Claude — automatic session capture. 37,126 stars with sustained +1,045/day growth, one of the most-starred Claude Code plugins.

- **Discovered**: 2026-02-02
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 37,126 stars (+1,045/day)
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### ⚡ [claude-sneakpeek](https://github.com/mikekelly/claude-sneakpeek)

Inspect Claude's internal reasoning and tool calls before they execute.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-25
- **Signal**: ⚡ 287 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [claude-subconscious](https://github.com/letta-ai/claude-subconscious)

Persistent subconscious memory layer for Claude agents using Letta.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-27
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### ⚡ [contract-agents]()

Formal behavioral contracts for AI agents — Design by Contract pattern applied to agent systems. Exited trending on Day 4 as predicted. ~1,250 stars.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-11
- **Signal**: ⚡ ⭐ ~1,250 stars (stabilized)
- **Tags**: `agent` `security` `open-source`

### 🌱 [Context7 MCP](https://github.com/upstash/context7)

MCP server providing up-to-date library documentation for AI coding agents.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-31
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `mcp`

### 🌱 [CrewAI](https://github.com/crewAIInc/crewAI)

Role-based multi-agent framework where AI agents collaborate like a specialized crew.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-29
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [CUA Computer](https://github.com/trycua/cua)

Computer-use agent framework — let AI agents control desktop GUIs.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-27
- **Signal**: 🌱 11 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [fastrender](https://github.com/wilsonzlin/fastrender)

High-performance rendering library generated with AI assistance (1M+ lines of code).

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-16
- **Signal**: 🌱 68 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### ⚡ [hermes-agent](https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent)

NousResearch's adaptive learning agent — 'the agent that grows with you.' 8,951 stars (+4,046/week), confirming sustained adoption beyond initial hype.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-10
- **Signal**: ⚡ ⭐ 8,951 stars (+4,046/week)
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🌱 [human.json]()

Lightweight authorship assertion protocol — a human.json file (like robots.txt) for declaring content authorship with a vouch mechanism.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-10
- **Signal**: 🌱 49 Lobsters comments

### ⚡ [HumanLayer](https://www.humanlayer.dev)

Human-in-the-loop controls for AI agents — require human approval before sensitive actions.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-27
- **Signal**: ⚡ 354 HN points

### ⚡ [Kimi CLI](https://github.com/moonshotai/kimi-cli)

Command-line interface for Moonshot AI's Kimi LLM models.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-31
- **Signal**: ⚡ 304 HN points
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🌱 [LangChain](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langchain)

Popular framework for building LLM-powered applications and agent chains.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-29
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### ⚡ [LiveKit Agents](https://github.com/livekit/agents)

Real-time AI agent framework — build voice/video agents with LLMs.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-27
- **Signal**: ⚡ 266 HN points
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🌱 [LLMTest Needle-in-Haystack](https://github.com/gkamradt/LLMTest_NeedleInAHaystack)

Benchmark for LLM long-context retrieval — find a fact in a large document.

- **Discovered**: 2026-02-02
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [Maestro](https://github.com/RunMaestro/Maestro)

- **Discovered**: 2026-02-02

### ⚡ [Mastra](https://github.com/mastra-ai/mastra)

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-21
- **Signal**: ⚡ 208 HN points

### 🌱 [mcp-agent-mail](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/mcp_agent_mail)

MCP server for email — let AI agents send and read emails programmatically.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-25
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `mcp` `agent` `open-source`

### 🔥 [MiroFish](https://github.com/666ghj/MiroFish)

Chinese-origin swarm intelligence engine — 'predict anything' using particle swarm and ant colony algorithms. Sustained velocity pushing to 39,270 stars (+15,056/week). No deceleration after two weeks.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-10
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 39,270 stars (+15,056/week)
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### ⚡ [memU](https://github.com/NevaMind-AI/memU)

Unified multi-tier memory architecture for persistent AI agent context.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-31
- **Signal**: ⚡ ⭐ 6,614 stars
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🔥 [Model Context Protocol](https://modelcontextprotocol.info/blog/mcp-next-version-update/)

- **Signal**: 🔥 967 HN points

### 🔥 [OpenCode](https://opencode.ai)

### 🔥 [superpowers](https://github.com/obra/superpowers)

Agentic skills framework and software development methodology — crossed 100K stars on Mar 21, reaching 104,594 (+20,308/week). One of fewer than 70 GitHub repos to ever hit this threshold. Official Anthropic marketplace acceptance.

- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### ⚡ [Axe](https://github.com/jrswab/axe)

Minimal 12MB single-binary AI agent framework — the anti-complexity counter-movement to agent framework bloat. No dependencies, no framework lock-in.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-13
- **Signal**: ⚡ 190 HN points
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### ⚡ [openrag](https://github.com/langflow-ai/openrag)

Comprehensive RAG platform combining Langflow, Docling, and Opensearch. 3,317 stars (+2,537/week), sustained growth.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-13
- **Signal**: ⚡ ⭐ 3,317 stars (+2,537/week)
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### ⚡ [InsForge](https://github.com/insforge/insforge)

Backend built for agentic development — give agents everything they need to ship fullstack apps. Agent-native infrastructure. 3,951 stars, +477/day Day 2 acceleration.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-13
- **Signal**: ⚡ ⭐ 3,951 stars (+477/day)
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### ⚡ [hindsight](https://github.com/vectorize-io/hindsight)

Agent memory that learns — adaptive memory improving over time rather than static storage. From vectorize-io. 5,009 stars (+2,183/week), sustained growth.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-13
- **Signal**: ⚡ ⭐ 5,009 stars (+2,183/week)
- **Tags**: `agent` `memory` `open-source`

### 🔥 [claude-plugins-official](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-official)

Official Anthropic-managed directory of high-quality Claude Code plugins. Curated ecosystem vs open marketplace. 11,069 stars, steady +411/day.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-13
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 11,069 stars (+411/day)
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🔥 [AstrBot]()

IM chatbot infrastructure platform — multi-platform bot framework for messaging services. 22,700 stars with sustained +342/day growth.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-12
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 22,700 stars (+342/day)
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🔥 [OpenViking](https://github.com/volcengine/OpenViking)

ByteDance's open-source context database for AI agents — replaces fragmented vector stores with a file-system paradigm unifying memory, resources, and skills under a viking:// protocol. Self-evolving memory with built-in iteration loops. 18,100 stars (+151/day), sustained.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-14
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 18,100 stars
- **Tags**: `agent` `memory` `open-source`

### 🔥 [CLI-Anything](https://github.com/HKUDS/CLI-Anything)

HKU's 'Making ALL Software Agent-Native' — auto-generates CLI wrappers for any software (Blender, LibreOffice, FFmpeg) via a 7-phase pipeline, with built-in --json for machine consumption. 12,800 stars.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-14
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 12,800 stars
- **Tags**: `agent` `cli` `open-source`

### 🔥 [autoresearch](https://github.com/karpathy/autoresearch)

Karpathy's autonomous ML research framework — 630-line script that runs experiments overnight on a single GPU. 333 experiments unsupervised in one night. Shopify CEO reported 19% validation improvement. 29,100 stars in one week.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-14
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 29,100 stars
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🌱 [Context Gateway](https://github.com/Compresr-ai/Context-Gateway)

Agentic proxy that compresses agent context before it hits the LLM — sits between your AI agent and the API, compacting history in the background so agents never wait. Addresses the core context engineering bottleneck.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-14
- **Signal**: 🌱 86 HN Show points
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🌱 [GitAgent](https://github.com/open-gitagent/gitagent)

Open standard for git-native AI agents — your repo IS the agent. Framework-agnostic, works with Claude/OpenAI/CrewAI. Version agents with git branches, test behavior in CI, share via public registry.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-14
- **Signal**: 🌱 Show HN launch
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🔥 [cognee](https://github.com/topoteretes/cognee)

Agent memory engine — build and manage knowledge graphs for AI agents. 14,047 stars with sustained +270/day growth. Fills the persistent memory layer in the agent stack.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-16
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 14,047 stars (+270/day)
- **Tags**: `agent` `memory` `open-source`

### 🌱 [dimos](https://github.com/dimensionalOS/dimos)

Agentic OS for physical space — 'vibecode humanoids.' First robotics/physical-space agent framework on GitHub trending. 966 stars.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-15
- **Signal**: 🌱 ⭐ 966 stars (+72/day)
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### ⚡ [OneCLI](https://github.com/AshishKumar4/onecli)

Vault for AI agents in Rust — secure credential management for agent workflows. Addresses the #1 agent security gap with compiled-language security.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-15
- **Signal**: ⚡ 160 HN points
- **Tags**: `agent` `security` `open-source`

### ⚡ [Rudel](https://github.com/rudel-dev/rudel)

Claude Code session analytics — first dedicated observability tool for Claude Code sessions. Track costs, usage patterns, and session performance.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-15
- **Signal**: ⚡ 143 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🔥 [Leanstral]()

Open-source agent for formal proof engineering using Lean 4 — highest-engagement formal methods story ever on HN. AI-native theorem proving enters the mainstream.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-17
- **Signal**: 🔥 412 HN points
- **Tags**: `formal-verification` `lean4` `proof-engineering` `agents`

### 🔥 [deepagents](https://github.com/langchain-ai/deepagents)

Official LangChain agent harness with planning, web browsing, and coding built on LangGraph — 16,621 stars (+5,487/week), accelerating. In direct competition with superpowers (shell-native) and Claude Code Skills (IDE-native).

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-17
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 16,621 stars (+5,487/week)
- **Tags**: `langchain` `langgraph` `agent-harness` `planning` `open-source`

### 🌱 [Agent Lifecycle Toolkit (ALTK)]()

Reusable middleware for production AI agent deployment — addresses the gap between agent prototyping and production-grade lifecycle management. ArXiv paper.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-17
- **Signal**: 🌱 ArXiv paper
- **Tags**: `agent-lifecycle` `production` `middleware` `devops`

### 🌱 [Antfly](https://github.com/antflydb/antfly)

Distributed multimodal search, memory, and graph database in Go — agent-native data infrastructure combining vector search with knowledge graphs.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-17
- **Signal**: 🌱 103 HN points (Show HN relaunch)
- **Tags**: `agent` `search` `memory` `open-source`

### ⚡ [Voygr]()

YC W26 — maps and geospatial API designed specifically for AI agent consumption. First agent-native geospatial infrastructure.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-17
- **Signal**: ⚡ 72 HN points
- **Tags**: `geospatial` `maps` `agent-infrastructure` `yc-w26`

### 🔥 [context-hub](https://github.com/andrewyng/context-hub)

Andrew Ng's curated, versioned API documentation for coding agents — agents search, fetch, and annotate docs with a self-improvement feedback loop. 11,465 stars (+5,224/week), sustained growth.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-18
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 11,465 stars (+5,224/week)
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🔥 [NemoClaw](https://github.com/nvidia/NemoClaw)

Nvidia's orchestration framework for secure sandboxed agent deployment — policy-driven containment with hot-reloadable security policies and Nemotron inference integration. 15,400 stars (+140/day), sustained.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-18
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 15,400 stars
- **Tags**: `agent` `security` `open-source`

### ⚡ [open-swe](https://github.com/langchain-ai/open-swe)

LangChain's open-source framework for building internal coding agents — triggers from Slack/Linear/GitHub, runs in isolated cloud sandboxes, auto-creates PRs. Sustained growth past initial spike.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-19
- **Signal**: ⚡ ⭐ 6,991+ stars
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### ⚡ [Signet](https://signet.watch)

Autonomous wildfire tracking from satellite and weather data — AI agents applied to environmental monitoring. First non-software agent application in tracking.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-18
- **Signal**: ⚡ 123 HN points
- **Tags**: `agent`

### 🔥 [KittenTTS](https://github.com/KittenML/KittenTTS)

Three open-source TTS models — smallest under 25MB, CPU-only, ONNX-based. Sustained to 554 HN pts (Day 3+). Sub-25MB footprint enables bundling with CLI agents for offline voice. Viable piper-tts alternative.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-19
- **Signal**: 🔥 554 HN points (sustained)
- **Tags**: `tts` `open-source`

### ⚡ [agent-sat](https://github.com/iliazintchenko/agent-sat)

Autoresearch for SAT solvers — AI-driven research agent that autonomously improves SAT solver performance. Karpathy's overnight-experiment paradigm applied beyond ML.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-19
- **Signal**: ⚡ 162 HN points
- **Tags**: `agent` `research` `open-source`

### 🔥 [get-shit-done](https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done)

Meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for Claude Code — competing with superpowers for the 'canonical agentic methodology' position. 39,200 stars, sustained at +301/day.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-20
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 39,200 stars
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### ⚡ [ralph-claude-code](https://github.com/ralph-claude/ralph-claude-code)

Autonomous development loop for Claude Code — self-referential execution with exit detection. 8,066 stars. Part of the Claude Code ecosystem expansion beyond plugins into workflow automation.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-22
- **Signal**: ⚡ ⭐ 8,066 stars
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🔥 [TradingAgents](https://github.com/TauricResearch/TradingAgents)

Multi-agent LLM financial trading framework — agents analyze market data, execute trades, manage risk. 38,000 stars (+1,051/day), with Chinese adaptation TradingAgents-CN at 20K. Domain-specific multi-agent validated.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-21
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 38,000 stars (+1,051/day)
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🌱 [ClawMem]()

Agent memory with SOTA local GPU retrieval — GPU-accelerated vector store for agent context. Part of the Mar 22 agent infrastructure gold rush (4 independent memory/context tools in one day).

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-22
- **Signal**: 🌱 Show HN launch
- **Tags**: `agent` `memory` `open-source`

### 🌱 [Entroly]()

Compress codebase context for LLMs by 78% using Rust — reduces context window consumption without lossy compression. Complementary to memory tools: compress first, then store/retrieve.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-22
- **Signal**: 🌱 Show HN launch
- **Tags**: `agent` `rust` `open-source`

### 🌱 [Helios]()

Agent-vs-agent security testing — 3 Claude agents (Red vs Blue) hack and patch code autonomously. Novel paradigm: using AI agents to red-team code produced by other AI agents before deployment.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-22
- **Signal**: 🌱 Show HN launch
- **Tags**: `agent` `security`

### 🔥 [deer-flow](https://github.com/bytedance/deer-flow)

ByteDance's SuperAgent harness — researches, codes, and creates using sandboxes, memories, tools, skills, and subagents. Handles tasks from minutes to hours autonomously. 36,600 stars (+1,690/day debut) — highest first-day velocity for any multi-agent framework in 2026.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-23
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 36,600 stars (+1,690/day)
- **Tags**: `agent` `bytedance` `open-source`

### 🔥 [pentagi](https://github.com/vxcontrol/pentagi)

Fully autonomous AI pentesting system in Go — performs complex penetration testing tasks without human oversight. 12,400 stars (+1,069/day). Go implementation signals production readiness. Fastest-growing security-focused agent.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-23
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 12,400 stars (+1,069/day)
- **Tags**: `agent` `security` `go` `open-source`

### ⚡ [Understand-Anything](https://github.com/nicepkg/understand-anything)

Claude Code skills that turn codebases into interactive knowledge graphs — shift from 'AI writes code' to 'AI understands code.' Multi-platform (works with Codex). 4,700 stars (+489/day).

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-23
- **Signal**: ⚡ ⭐ 4,700 stars (+489/day)
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### ⚡ [Claude-Code-Game-Studios](https://github.com/nicepkg/claude-code-game-studios)

48 AI agents mirroring real game studio hierarchy — 36 workflow skills with full coordination system. Most complex multi-agent coordination system documented on GitHub. 2,500 stars (+328/day).

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-23
- **Signal**: ⚡ ⭐ 2,500 stars (+328/day)
- **Tags**: `agent` `game-dev` `open-source`

### 🔥 [everything-claude-code](https://github.com/affaan-m/everything-claude-code)

Agent harness performance optimization system — 13 expert agents, 40+ skills, 32 commands. By Anthropic hackathon winner. 99,500 stars (+3,724/day), approaching 100K milestone. Largest Claude Code ecosystem project.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-20
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 99,500 stars (+3,724/day)
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### ⚡ [Attention-Residuals](https://github.com/MoonshotAI/Attention-Residuals)

MoonshotAI/Kimi's drop-in replacement for standard residual connections in Transformers — depth-wise attention over previous layers. Achieves same performance with 1.25x less compute. 236 HN pts. Published at ICLR 2026.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-20
- **Signal**: ⚡ 236 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [Sashiko](https://sashiko.dev)

Agentic Linux kernel code review system — AI-powered review of kernel patches. First domain-specific agent for OS kernel development.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-22
- **Signal**: 🌱 40 HN points
- **Tags**: `agent`

### ⚡ [Flash-MoE](https://github.com/danveloper/flash-moe)

Pure C/Metal inference engine running Qwen3.5-397B (397 billion parameters) on a MacBook Pro with 48GB RAM at 4.4+ tokens/sec. No Python, no frameworks — just C and hand-tuned Metal shaders. The entire 209GB model streams from SSD.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-22
- **Signal**: ⚡ 175 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [Horizon](https://github.com/nicepkg/horizon)

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-19
- **Signal**: 🌱 76 HN points

### ⚡ [Ghostling](https://github.com/ghostty-org/ghostling)

Minimum viable terminal emulator built on libghostty C API — single C file using Raylib for rendering. Demonstrates Ghostty's VT parser as a standalone library: SIMD-optimized parsing, leading Unicode support, fuzzed codebase. 326 HN pts, 67 comments.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-21
- **Signal**: ⚡ 326 HN points

### ⚡ [Termcraft](https://github.com/pagel-s/termcraft)

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-21

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-20
- **Signal**: ⚡ 137 HN points (Show HN)

### ⚡ [Floci](https://github.com/hectorvent/floci)

### ⚡ [Mamba-3](https://github.com/state-spaces/mamba)

Together.ai's state space model — outperforms Transformers by 4% on language modeling, runs 7x faster. Half the state size of Mamba-2. Apache 2.0. Published at ICLR 2026. 292 HN pts. Inference efficiency as the primary design goal.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-21
- **Signal**: ⚡ 292 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source`

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-23
